# Support

Thanks for using Hogyoku. Here's how to get help.

## Before opening an issue

1. Read [docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md](../docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md) — it covers the
   most common setup and runtime questions.
2. Check the [documentation](../README.md#documentation): OVERVIEW, ARCHITECTURE,
   API, TIERS, and SETUP_REQUIRED.
3. Search existing [issues](https://github.com/geek007git/Hogyoku-OSS/issues) and
   [discussions](https://github.com/geek007git/Hogyoku-OSS/discussions).

## Where to ask

- **Questions & ideas:** GitHub Discussions.
- **Bugs & feature requests:** open an issue using the provided templates.
- **Security vulnerabilities:** do **not** open a public issue — follow the
  [Security Policy](SECURITY.md).

## Helping us help you

When reporting a problem, include your deployment tier, OS, Node version, whether
a model provider is configured, and the exact error output (with secrets
redacted). Clear reproduction steps get faster answers.
